textByHash.0ac2071e1df1d91a3dcca6467baef8d75c75477e: You've got a hammer and a saw. I wouldn't be able to offer you anything else.
textByHash.11e9e44fb3bea908fc056e9367d97b4046050476: Ah. Look in the place where the new furniture will go...
textByHash.20f238a3fe7f3ce203e2137dba580fc181fbe4ee: What brings you here, young man?
textByHash.21a66d84093cabda61531bda3058b1a3c3e1bf52: Oh, that's nice. I used to wander around, back when my legs were better. So long ago.
textByHash.28130dc31eec4c85bad7fcffc2c07706881818db: You young people are always rushing around trying to optimise the fun out of life. There are other ways to enjoy the world, you know! But I'm sure you know best.
textByHash.3ca5b0acdc952c6a2b145364946ea4d7dc26c3ea: Hello again, young man. You really did wonders for my little home. I feel so much happier living here now.
textByHash.3d0297fa216bcac9cfb1c8be42e1e27775c6ec22: You see, I used to be a carpenter myself, before the arthritis got me. Such wonderful things I could build. Let me tell you about the things Construction can do for you...
textByHash.493436a88d2049fba249374d8b3c82718d73fa0d: Yes, you should do that. You've earned it.
textByHash.4aa5bb235884dd0672b12890e94085455394b1e8: Jolly good, young man. Now, we'll need to have a talk about what you'll build for me to replace it.
textByHash.599409216762786e14d0878405ea830cdd16b6b5: My boy Marlo sent you? Oh yes, you've come to help with my furniture. It's in a terrible state. You'll want to start by removing all the tatty old furniture.
textByHash.5d75a24ce91d9d984ba46076e5cc26e03266391a: Hello again, young lady. You really did wonders for my little home. I feel so much happier living here now.
textByHash.5d818be1bb92a29100ab80794d6f4d3009ce3ef1: That's the trouble with young people these days. Not my boy, though. He's a good boy, always working. That's why he never visits. Run along now, young man.
textByHash.5fc571d90f6d537bdea6cbd9aab6f10980ba2060: Do you need some help with the building work, young man?
textByHash.6bfdf9a0007d49ea76fd988037cdd0aa34cbc5f3: That's the trouble with young people these days. Not my boy, though. He's a good boy, always working. That's why he never visits. Run along now, young one.
textByHash.77d787d85f5240c70284f03a5e24e17997019d01: Would you like a hammer? I can spare one.
textByHash.7dbf22120b5ab2b9385408715b4aef706d06f74d: What brings you here, young lady?
textByHash.7edbc5c3bb48a4b0cb7aac4d537210f0c88f18c8: Watch out, though - nails can bend, if you're not careful. You should probably get some spares, just in case.
textByHash.8025328ee3ba3f573ff003c69f77d74dd543c2aa: Ah, young man, how's the redecoration coming on?
textByHash.83ae7b67df78153071ef18ea690f6c5678e00540: Hello again, young one. You really did wonders for my little home. I feel so much happier living here now.
textByHash.8612c28412014c53b15265c1e3e32719d4926d9f: What brings you here, young one?
textByHash.91825e40091ee35c269814aa28475482526e77ab: From the sawmill! They sell nails and cloth at reasonable prices. You'd have to take your own logs there, though, to get planks, but there are plenty of trees to chop nearby.
textByHash.96aefaede10b9a4b4b4661e77126ad1427d3e802: You'll need a hammer and saw. I can supply those if you need them.
textByHash.9aea583069d1af9f775a49278b1d255f10d9ed69: Now, I was just getting round to telling you about the furniture I want you to build for me. For a start, I'd like two new stools, two new tables and a new chair.
textByHash.a0064547df53b7cbcaf3f052422f6d455fd8ff07: That's the trouble with young people these days. Not my boy, though. He's a good boy, always working. That's why he never visits. Run along now, young lady.
textByHash.a5eda68bbe59692fe1f19a3a878429376ac8cc9f: Would you like a saw? I can spare one.
textByHash.abdf35e22a51a1b8e024656613c0c15e180819b1: That's everything! Thank you so much, young man. Trot off back to my boy Marlo, now. He'll have something for you.
textByHash.b366c840c9573d1cf0ff28a4895a01fcb325fbf2: There are two stools, two tables, a chair and a rotten carpet to replace. I need a better bed too. Let me know when you've removed all the old furniture.
textByHash.c5e11bb72024a01d88dbbd37cc90acf59a291a8a: You still need to remove: - A broken stool in the kitchen - A broken stool in the bedroom - A broken chair in the bedroom
textByHash.cb321b62e97cfdd91618f9e988aa831364de69f0: Now, for the bed, I've got something special in mind. This town's quite damp, and I don't want the moisture rising up the bed into my blankets. But I've found some wood that resists water.
textByHash.de7e1ab830095d9cb12a97a2ac2d4ca914144d34: This town's quite damp, and I don't want the moisture rising up the bed into my blankets. But I've found some wood that resists water.
textByHash.debaf6082953fe0f1f8b292adc2f7da602797398: Hello again, young man. Has my boy Marlo rewarded you yet?
textByHash.ef3c9e1e6e0fed6aebb30eda60cf9a3bb394e367: I think that's everything - two stools, two tables, a chair, a bed and a carpet. Off you trot, young man. I'll be here if you have any questions.
textByHash.f261507357a98131f1544530599b2a7134b30063: You'll want to start by removing all the tatty old furniture. There are two stools, two tables, a chair and a rotten carpet to remove, as well as the campbed. Let me know when you've done that.
textByHash.fad4d7f4fc45856bf4479237d43ec28bf8cd79c3: - A broken table in the kitchen - A broken table in the bedroom - The old campbed - The rotten carpet
